title: デビュー戦の後に・達筆な焼き鳥屋

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though she didn't win, Haru Urara seems satisfied
with today's race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together we plan to have her enter more races
and gain more experience with her head held
high.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On her way back home, Haru Urara runs into her
shopping district friends, who are celebrating her
debut.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She vows to get stronger to make her beloved
shopkeepers proud.
